channel.title: AI on Cloud Artisan
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Cloud Artisan

item.title: Shrnk.ai
item.description: A modern URL shortening service with AI-powered features for link management.

item.title: Getting Started with OpenAI Codex CLI
item.description:
I’ve been playing with the recently announced OpenAI Codex CLI.

What is OpenAI Codex CLI? #

OpenAI Codex CLI is available on GitHub. It’s a lightweight AI coding assistant that runs directly in the terminal, like Claude Code from Anthropic.

Features include:

  • Read, modify, and run code
  • Multimodal input for processing screenshots and diagrams
  • Different approval levels

While it’s still labeled as experimental, OpenAI is actively seeking community contributions. They’re even offering a $1 million initiative supporting open-source projects that use Codex CLI, with grants in $25,000 API credit increments.

item.title: The Turing Option: A Prophetic Vision of Modern AI
item.description:
Recently, I found myself reminiscing about a sci-fi novel I read in high school: The Turing Option by Marvin Minsky and Harry Harrison. Published in 1992, this book has been on my mind as I’ve watched the recent explosion in development of modern AI.

What stands out isn’t just that it was co-authored by Minsky—one of the founding fathers of artificial intelligence—but how many concepts in the book parallel today’s AI landscape.
